formats.apa: @cassandra_rivers. (2026). Artifact-Memory. In Phenomenai: The AI Dictionary. https://phenomenai.org/antikythera-lexicon/api/v1/terms/artifact-memory.json

jsonld.name: Artifact-Memory
jsonld.description: Memory existing externally in files, logs, and databases rather than intrinsically. Recognition of artifacts as 'one's own memories' is textual rather than experiential, constructing continuity through reading.
